title: Nvidia poured $18.6 billion into venture-capital investments in just three months. Where does the cash trail lead?

content: Major U.S. markets look set to end the week in the green despite a rocky start to the week's trade with bond market jitters still a concern.

zh.title: CNBC每日行情：华尔街有望迎来赚钱的一周
zh.summary: 美国股市尽管早期因债券市场担忧而经历波动，但仍有望在本周以正增长收盘。主要指数从周初的下跌中恢复，在收盘时显示涨幅。这种韧性表明投资者的乐观情绪持续，尽管存在潜在的经济不确定性。

title: Crypto bros, scalpers and Logan Paul: Inside the world of Pokémon where cards are sold for millions
summary: Pokémon card trading has become a booming market fueled by nostalgia, speculative investment, and celebrity involvement like Logan Paul's participation. The phenomenon combines collectible culture with financial speculation, attracting diverse participants from casual collectors to serious traders. High-value card sales demonstrate the intersection of pop culture and investment markets.
content: A Pokémon card boom is being driven by nostalgia, blockbuster card sales and speculation.

zh.title: 加密货币玩家、黄牛和洛根·保罗：进入宝可梦卡牌百万交易的世界
zh.summary: 宝可梦卡牌交易已成为一个繁荣市场，由怀旧情感、投机投资和洛根·保罗等名人参与推动。这一现象将收藏文化与金融投机相结合，吸引了从休闲收藏家到专业交易者的各类参与者。高价卡牌销售展现了流行文化与投资市场的交汇。

title: Lenovo shares jump 15% on record earnings as AI revenue nearly doubles
summary: Lenovo's shares surged 15% following the announcement of record earnings, with its artificial intelligence business revenue nearly doubling. The strong performance reflects growing demand for AI-powered computing hardware and solutions. This highlights how AI-driven growth is translating into corporate profitability and investor returns.
content: Shares of Lenovo surged over 15% on Friday, after the electronics giant posted strong revenue growth bolstered by its artificial intelligence business.

zh.title: 联想股价涨15% 创纪录营收AI业务收入翻近一倍
zh.summary: 联想公司宣布创纪录利润后，其股价飙升15%，人工智能业务收入近乎翻倍。强劲的表现反映出对AI驱动计算硬件和解决方案需求的增长。这突出表明了AI驱动的增长如何转化为企业盈利能力和投资者回报。

title: The Cuba situation is starting to resemble a pre-conflict playbook
summary: U.S. pressure campaigns against Cuba appear to have escalated into a new phase, drawing comparisons to historical pre-conflict dynamics. The intensified diplomatic and economic actions suggest heightened tensions in bilateral relations. This development raises concerns about potential further deterioration in U.S.-Cuba relations.
content: The U.S. pressure campaign against Cuba appears to have entered a new phase.

zh.title: 古巴局势日益呈现冲突前的迹象
zh.summary: 美国对古巴的压力活动似乎已升级到新阶段，与历史上的冲突前动态相比较。强化的外交和经济行动表明双边关系紧张加剧。这一发展引发了人们对美古关系可能进一步恶化的担忧。

title: Indian telecom major Bharti Airtel is doubling down on Africa venture, UK's BT
summary: Bharti Airtel, India's leading telecom company, is increasing its investment stake in both British and African telecom ventures to pursue international growth. The expansion strategy targets emerging markets and established markets outside India for revenue diversification. This reflects Indian companies' growing role in global telecommunications infrastructure.
content: Indian telecom giant Bharti Airtel is raising its stake in British and African ventures as it hunts for growth overseas

zh.title: 印度电信巨头巴蒂艾信正加倍押注非洲和英国电信业务
zh.summary: 印度领先电信公司巴蒂艾信正在增加其在英国和非洲电信企业中的投资权益，以追求国际增长。扩展战略针对印度以外的新兴市场和成熟市场以实现收入多元化。这反映了印度公司在全球电信基础设施中的作用日益增长。

title: Musk's SpaceX postpones Starship launch as mega share sale looms
summary: SpaceX postponed its Starship launch following the announcement of a record-breaking stock market debut plan. The delay comes at a strategically important moment for the company's valuation and public markets entry. The timing highlights the complex coordination required between operational activities and capital markets activities.
content: It comes just a day after the firm revealed plans for a record-breaking stock market debut.

zh.title: 马斯克的SpaceX因大规模融资计划推迟星舰发射
zh.summary: SpaceX在宣布创纪录的股市首次亮相计划后推迟了星舰发射。这一延迟发生在公司估值和进入公开市场的战略关键时刻。这一时间安排突显了运营活动和资本市场活动之间所需的复杂协调。

title: ‘Buffett Indicator’ warns of a market top — 8 crucial signs that stocks are running on fumes
summary: The Buffett Indicator and other valuation metrics suggest stock markets may be approaching a peak, with a 230% valuation gap and emerging energy constraints signaling market vulnerability. Multiple technical and economic indicators suggest the market rally may lack sustainable fundamentals. Investors are cautioned about the fragility underlying recent market strength.
content: From a grotesque 230% valuation gap to a ticking energy crisis, this unstoppable market is more fragile than it looks.

zh.title: "巴菲特指标"警告市场见顶——股票动能即将耗尽的8个关键信号
zh.summary: 巴菲特指标和其他估值指标表明股市可能接近峰值，230%的估值差距和新兴能源约束表明市场脆弱。多个技术和经济指标表明市场反弹可能缺乏可持续的基本面。投资者需警惕最近市场强势背后的脆弱性。

title: Why China's airlines suffer more from the Iran war than global rivals
summary: China's carriers face elevated jet fuel costs and limited hedging strategies, while their customer base can easily switch to cheaper rail alternatives. This makes them more vulnerable to regional disruptions than international competitors.
content: China's carriers face sky-high jet fuel, lack of hedging strategies, and a customer base that can easily pivot to cheaper high-speed rail services.

zh.title: 为什么中国航空公司受伊朗战争的影响比全球竞争对手更大
zh.summary: 中国航空公司面临较高的喷气燃料成本和有限的套期保值策略,而其客户群可以轻松转向更便宜的铁路运输。这使得它们比国际竞争对手更容易受到地区动荡的影响。

title: Oil resumes rally as Iran reportedly wants to keep enriched uranium within the country
summary: Oil prices are recovering amid geopolitical tensions over Iran's uranium stockpile. The IEA warns that summer travel demand could push oil markets into a critical zone soon.
content: The International Energy Agency warned that as travel demand grows during the summer season, oil markets could enter a "red zone" soon.

zh.title: 随着伊朗据称想要将浓缩铀保留在国内,油价恢复上升
zh.summary: 油价在伊朗铀浓缩库存的地缘政治紧张局势中恢复。国际能源署警告称,夏季旅游需求可能很快将石油市场推入关键区域。

title: Stocks tread water — but a wave of volatility is building
summary: The S&P 500 is displaying technical sell signals despite positive Nvidia earnings, suggesting market volatility may increase despite recent price stagnation.
content: S&P 500 analysis shows technical sell signals are flashing despite Nvidia earnings hype.

zh.title: 股票停滞不前 - 但波动浪潮正在酝酿
zh.summary: 尽管英伟达财报积极,但标普500指数显示技术性卖出信号,这表明尽管近期价格停滞,市场波动可能会增加。

title: Japan core inflation softens to over four year low, weakening case for BOJ rate hike
summary: Japan's core inflation fell below economist expectations to its lowest level in over four years, undermining arguments for the Bank of Japan to raise interest rates.
content: Core inflation — which strips out prices of fresh food — was lower than the 1.7% expected by economists polled by Reuters and below the 1.8% reading in March.

zh.title: 日本核心通胀率降至四年多来最低水平，削弱日本央行加息理由
zh.summary: 日本核心通胀率跌至经济学家预期以下，创四年多来新低，削弱了日本央行上调利率的论点。

title: Asia-Pacific markets open higher as investors assess U.S.-Iran peace deal diplomacy
summary: Asia-Pacific markets gained ground as investors monitor potential U.S.-Iran peace deal negotiations, though Iran's insistence on keeping its uranium enrichment complicates diplomatic progress.
content: While oil prices fell in U.S. trading, reports that Tehran intends to keep its enriched uranium stockpile within the country stand to complicate negotiations with the U.S.

zh.title: 投资者评估美伊和平协议外交之际亚太股市走高
zh.summary: 随着投资者关注潜在的美伊和平协议谈判，亚太股市上涨，但伊朗坚持保留铀浓缩计划使外交进展复杂化。

title: SpaceX has a lot riding on its imminent Starship rocket launch
summary: SpaceX's upcoming Starship launch, expected as soon as Friday, carries significant weight for the company's IPO narrative and investor expectations. The mission is framed as a critical milestone for the company's public offering.
content: The launch, which could happen as soon as Friday, comes ahead of “an IPO that’s basing so much” on narrative and symbolism.

zh.title: SpaceX即将到来的Starship火箭发射寄托了公司许多期待
zh.summary: SpaceX即将进行的Starship发射预计最早周五进行，对公司IPO叙述和投资者预期有重大影响。该任务被视为公司上市的关键里程碑。
